ratio_source_quote: the binary amorphous composition of ezetimibe and simvastatin in the weight ratio of 1:1
process_details: Physical mixture obtained by gentle mixing in a mortar for 15-20 min, then quench cooled in DSC at 10 K/min after melting.
source_quote: The amorphous form of EZB/SVT composition stored at standard storage conditions was measured by means of XRD ... even after 1 year, the examined EZB/SVT system did not reveal any sign of re-crystallization.
notes: Stored at standard storage conditions (T = 298 K, RH = 60%). XRD measured daily for a week, weekly for a month, then monthly up to 1 year.

ratio_source_quote: the binary amorphous composition of ezetimibe and simvastatin in the weight ratio of 1:1
process_details: Physical mixture obtained by gentle mixing in a mortar for 15-20 min, then quench cooled in DSC at 10 K/min after melting.
source_quote: During the second XRD experiment, in which the sample was exposed to the elevated temperature conditions (T = 373 K), the XRD patterns were collected every 30 min for 30 h. ... At this temperature, the first appearance of sharp Bragg's peaks was noticed after only 210 min.
notes: Stored at elevated temperature (T = 373 K, ~50 K above Tg), supercooled liquid state. Recrystallization onset at 210 min (3.5 h = 0.146 d). Total experiment duration 30 h.
review_reasons: Storage at T > Tg (supercooled liquid), well outside ICH Q1A protocols
RH not reported for 373 K experiment
